root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.total_loan_int ,coalesce( ( select sum( year_total_interest ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) , 0 ) as sum_int FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered where 1=1
